channel.title: SQL Server on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in SQL Server on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Expanding Azure Arc SQL Migration with SQL Server on Azure Virtual Machines
item.description:
Azure Arc SQL migration now supports SQL Server on Azure Virtual Machines as a target. Arc-enabled SQL Server instances can be migrated to either Azure SQL Managed Instance or SQL Server on Azure infrastructure using the same migration solution.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: Agent mode for GitHub Copilot in SQL Server Management Studio (SSMS)
item.description:
GitHub Copilot Agent mode is now in public preview in SQL Server Management Studio (SSMS). It can help investigate performance issues, tune queries, review maintenance and configuration, identify security concerns, troubleshoot errors, and assist with operational tasks.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: Snapshot backup for SQL Server in Azure VMs
item.description:
Azure Backup now supports snapshot-based backup for SQL Server on Azure Virtual Machines in public preview. It uses Azure disk snapshots with native SQL transaction log backups to provide near-instant, low-impact full backups for large SQL databases.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: SQL Server on Azure VMs in Malaysia West, Indonesia Central
item.description:
SQL Server on Azure Virtual Machines is now generally available in the Malaysia West and Indonesia Central Azure regions. This expands deployment options for SQL Server workloads closer to users and supports data residency needs.

  • Source: Azure Updates
